action.reasoning: Observation: 5-model LightGBM ensemble trained on 2008-2021 improved eval ic_mean from 0.052952 to 0.056730 in ~4.5 minutes. Analysis: training time is modest relative to budget; ensemble diversity appears beneficial. A next low-risk improvement is to add more diverse LightGBM members, including alternative regularization and tree-growth settings, while preserving the existing prediction format. Decision: extend the preset list and train a 10-model ensemble on 2008-2021, smoke-test locally, and submit evaluation.
action.command: python train.py --out checkpoints/ens_full_v2 --num_models 10 --use_presets --include_valid_train && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/ens_full_v2 --output local_pred_ens_full_v2.json
